scripts.build: npm run build:shared && node apps/api/scripts/encode-fonts.js && npm run build:web
scripts.dev: npm run dev:api & npm run dev:web
scripts.deploy:migrate: for f in apps/api/migrations/*.sql; do echo "Running $f"; npx wrangler d1 execute anon-polls-db --file="$f" --remote || echo "⚠️ $f returned non-zero, continuing..."; done
scripts.test: npm run test -w packages/shared && npm run test -w apps/api
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w packages/shared && npm run typecheck -w apps/api && npm run typecheck -w apps/web
